backFields.label: CARD MUST BE PRESENTED FOR DISCOUNT
backFields.value:
Option 1: Have the cashier SCAN the QR code on this card.
Option 2: Tell the cashier the promo code DN2026.
Option 3: Simply show this card on your phone — the cashier applies the discount.

All three methods are valid at every participating business.

backFields.label: PARTICIPATING BUSINESSES
backFields.value:
Baskin Robbins — BOGO 50% off scoops
Harland Brewing — 10% off
Board & Brew — 10% off
L&L Hawaiian Barbecue — 10% off
Kahoots — 20% off treats & bones
Mostra Coffee — 10% off
Rosinas — 10% off
Donut Touch — 10% off
Sushi Ren — 20% off, dine-in/carry out
Flippin Pizza — $5 off orders over $15, 1 per customer
Round Table Pizza (Rancho Bernardo) — 10% off

backFields.label: IMPORTANT
backFields.value: NOT GOOD WITH ANY OTHER OFFER. One discount per transaction unless otherwise noted. This card is non-transferable and non-refundable. Screenshots and reproductions are not valid. Cards flagged for suspicious activity may be deactivated without refund. The Program is not responsible for the quality or availability of goods/services at participating businesses. By using this card you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy at the Program website.
